text_block_list.text:
On a certain day before Stay Gold's 
debut race——

I was in the trainer suite researching those 
who share their debut with Stay Gold… 
Gathering data on those who you would 
consider to be in the same "generation".

After her debut, she will inevitably 
have chances to run against those 
in the same generation. No harm 
in gathering data but——

Suddenly, I realised something about 
Stay Gold's "memories".

Before my contract with Stay Gold, by her 
arrangement, she let me witness up close 
some recreations of her "memories" of 
races from another world.

I recall how shocked I felt at how genuine 
the memories felt. I also remember vividly 
hearing——

"—El Condor Pasa is making their way 
through!!! From the inside it's Air Groove—"

…voices inside the "memory" were calling 
out the names of other horsegirls.

So then does this mean there are 
horsegirls other than Stay Gold 
that exist in both worlds?

If this was the case, I may be able to 
conduct some research on the strong 
contenders to come——

——I decided it was time to start looking 
for Stay Gold, but as expected, she was 
nowhere to be found……

Afterwards, I tried searching for her in 
places she could be at. Sometimes I 
dwelled upon it, other times I followed 
my intuition ——

……and I found myself in front of a shrine. 
One quick look and no one was there, but—
………not here～

Even though I can hear her voice, she was 
nowhere to be seen. While trying to figure 
this out, I remembered I bought something 
ahead of time.
choice_data_list: I have this interesting juice from overseas…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hmm —— that sounds pretty good.
choice_data_list: Uwaa!? You were up in the tree!?
Uwaa!? You were up in the tree!?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I was just getting a bit thirsty. 
I'll be taking one.

While searching, I had the idea that I could 
share this drink with Stay Gold if I found her. 
Seems like this was some good thinking…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……You're here to talk about the guys 
we'll face in the upcoming races, right?
choice_data_list: Could we perhaps rely on your "memories"

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——…It's as you say, there are plenty of 
other horsegirls that exist in both worlds.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
However, the other world is the other 
world. This world is this world.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's like how I am currently upon an unknown 
journey, every other girl could also take on 
one of many paths.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That's why numerous scenarios may change. 
…To say it simply, I don't think we can rely 
entirely on these memories.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……While I can't exactly read the future, 
it's not entirely impossible to follow 
the ones that appear in my memories.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
As thanks for the juice, should 
we try it out tomorrow?
————The following day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sppppp 
Ring ———!!!! 
Auuuuuu 
Tummm ——!!!!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Funnyaka～～!! Hannyaka～～!! Where are you, my spring-themed item～!! Where are you, my autumn-like thing～!!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Uhm, Fukukitaru… You don't really have 
to try so hard, something like a lucky 
item, it's not like ——

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
T h a t i s n o t o k!! 
If we continue like this, then it's 
going to end up terrible～!!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Even so, we have been searching all this 
time, Miss Fukukitaru must also be feeling 
tired, are you not～?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What is this!! If it's for the sake of your 
Happy Futures then this is nothing～!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——Oh～ You guys are doing good today too huh.

text_block_list.name: Fukukitaru & Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaayaa!! Stego!? Ara, Miss Stego～

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Stego and…… Stego's Trainer. Hello.

Stay Gold brought me to where 
three horsegirls were gathered.

First is Silence Suzuka. With a high aptitude, 
I have been keeping track of her. She leaves 
a graceful and well-mannered impression.

Next is Meijiro Bright. A horsegirl from the 
esteemed Meijro Family who has a relaxed 
aura.

The last is Makikanefukukitaru. A lively 
horsegirl who seems to like fortune telling, 
and talks with mysterious mannerisms.

I recognised this trio from my recent 
research on those in the same 
generation as Stay Gold.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Are you searching for something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Uhm…… this morning, Fukukitaru suddenly 
approached Bright and I—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Stego, please hear me out!! According 
to my divinations, Suzuka and Bright are 
experiencing a boom boom crazy fall 
with their luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Our debut is so soon, so if this continues, 
it's going to end as a disaster! There's only 
the great bad dark misfortune approaching!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hoh～ Well that sounds about reasonable～

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Miss Fukukitaru has been using her 
utmost diligence to pursue lucky 
items to strengthen our fortunes～

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I see. You're really a caring friend, 
Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No no, not at all not at all～! 
This much is nothing～!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, we're all gen-mates with the best 
bond here! To be able to have a great time 
running together! Isn't that like seizing the 
Super Happy Great Luck!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ………You're not wrong at all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, by the way, Stego is definitely also a 
part of our Happy Happy Group! Let's 
catch some good fortune together!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I appreciate it. It's always better 
to be on the luckier side.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…So? What sort of lucky items have 
you all been searching for?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, that's right! Yes! For Bright, we're 
after a 'Spring-like' item! For Suzuka, it's 
something 'Autumn-like'!
choice_data_list: Wah, these are quite broad definitions
Wah, these are quite broad definitions

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
'Spring' and 'Autumn' huh. 
……What a stroke of fate.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright. Then leave the choosing of 
items to me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whattt!!! Thank you so truly much Stego!!!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is that really alright…?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, I'm only doing this because I 
want to. I also think Fukukitaru has a point.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
To run races, and everyone being happy. 
——Doesn't that sound interesting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Miss Stego, would one item perhaps be 
this on the table～?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. They're spring rolls. I got a couple 
that were freshly fried.
choice_data_list: So… so that's one of the items then…?
So… so that's one of the items then…?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——And for Suzuka it's this, maple leaf manju. I have a lot leftover after I bought them as souvenirs, they're pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
T-Thank you very much…… A maple leaf, 
autumn……——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
How's this Fukitaru? Do they seem 
like lucky items?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely perfect Stego! Suzuka and 
Bright's luck will undoubtedly skyrocket 
with a twirl and a jump with this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If the two of you do not mind, would 
you care to partake in some spring 
rolls? They are pipiiiing hot and 
incredibly delicious～

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All this is also a little too much for me 
to eat by myself, so if it's not too much 
to ask ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that alright? I've got to say, I've 
been getting a little hungry myself.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let's get our little gen-mate 
gathering started right now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yes!! Happy happy spring roll and manju gathering begins now!
Just like this, we suddenly joined Silence Suzuka and the others in a gathering to enjoy the spring rolls and manju.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Miss Stego, thank you very much for 
today. The spring rolls we partook in 
were increeeedibly delicious.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I also……the autumn leaf manju, they were very good. Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome. These kinds of 
things are good from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Stego! As thanks for today, I just 
prophesied your lucky item!!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Absolutely! It's a "compass-like" item!!!
choice_data_list: (The reading is more descriptive this time)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh～! Thanks for going through the trouble for that, I'll keep it in mind.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Suzuka, Bright, Fukitaru. 
I also had a lot of fun today.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let's look forward and have 
fun on this path together.

After saying goodbye to Silence Suzuka 
and the others, on the way to the Trainer's 
suite—

The horsegirls we met today, while all in 
the same generation, are in different year 
levels and possess different personalities.

Despite this, Stay Gold was chatting with 
those girls as if they were close friends, 
reminding me once again just how wide her 
friend circle was.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……It's because I have the opportunity 
to talk to them, I try to talk to them like 
this often.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Especially…… To those like Suzuka, 
those my other world self have a 
strong connection to.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……those guys, they're truly 
"the ones who shine".

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
In my "memories", they ran radiantly and 
sparkled, etching a lasting impression 
within me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That's why, even in this world… I feel an 
incredibly strong connection with them.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……Even if our events will be different to 
the other world, we will definitely cross 
paths in the future.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
When that time comes, we may encounter 
a threat on our journey… It think it may 
appear before us as a storm.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, please do.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Even so, we did a lot with 
those guys today huh.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …………Really now——

Her gaze was distant, looking at a tiny 
fluttering light far away, then 
unintentionally ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——It's not only Suzuka and the others.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
In this school, there are still plenty of 
strong ones that my memories are 
bound to——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——That's why, I'm looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: To the encounters I'll have from now on.
